summary.content: Data-driven Product Manager with 3+ years of experience in product analytics, experimentation, and AI product development. Unique combination of hands-on ML engineering depth and product intuition built through founding-engineer and consulting roles. Track record of shipping data products, running statistically rigorous A/B experiments, defining KPI frameworks, and translating user behavior insights into product roadmap decisions that drive measurable outcomes.

experience.title: Founding Engineer, Data and AI Applications
experience.company: Alphonso AI, Shipley Center for Innovation
bullets: Defined and tracked product quality metrics for an AI-powered candidate matching system; ran iterative experiments on retrieval strategies (Dense Vector + BM25) to achieve 38% improvement in search precision.

Conducted funnel analysis on MVP session data, synthesized drop-off findings into actionable product requirements, and directly shaped pre-launch UI/UX decisions through cross-functional collaboration.
Established model observability infrastructure (Grafana drift monitoring) and engagement-scoring instrumentation, creating continuous feedback loops that informed product iteration post-launch.

experience.title: Graduate Equity Research Analyst
experience.company: Student Managed Investment Fund, Clarkson University
bullets: Led automation of fundamental research workflows via the SEC EDGAR API and Google Vertex AI, reducing analyst time-on-task by 40% and standardizing data inputs across a team of 8 analysts.
Architected Tableau performance dashboards with LLM-driven earnings-call summaries, improving investment committee reporting velocity and enabling data-informed portfolio decisions.
Co-managed a $650K portfolio delivering 51% total return, outperforming the S&P 500 by 2,600 bps through systematic analysis frameworks and structured decision-making processes.

experience.title: Data Science Consultant
bullets: Designed and analyzed A/B experiments for dynamic ticket-pricing strategies using Power Analysis-based sample sizing, validating a statistically significant 12% revenue-per-ticket improvement that informed pricing policy changes.
Delivered customer segmentation and Uplift Modeling (CausalML) insights to optimize incremental marketing spend, replacing heuristic rules with data-driven audience targeting.
Built behavioral analytics pipelines processing 1M+ cross-channel events (GA4, CRM) via PySpark and AWS, reducing data latency by 30% and enabling timely campaign performance reporting.

experience.title: Business Data Analyst
bullets: Deployed automated KPI dashboards in Oracle Analytics Cloud, eliminating 12+ hours per week of manual reporting and enabling procurement team self-service analytics.
Drove 15% MAPE improvement in demand forecasting across 1,500+ SKUs by developing and productionizing a hybrid model (Prophet + SARIMAX) on approximately 800K daily ERP records.
Delivered GxP-compliant monitoring workflows with real-time alerting and 99.9% uptime, ensuring operational visibility for business-critical inventory management decisions.

experience.title: Data Analyst
bullets: Integrated 10M+ rows from 30+ heterogeneous data sources using PySpark and Databricks, reducing processing latency by 40% and improving data reliability for stakeholder reporting.
Designed sampling strategies and regression models to deliver consumer insights for 10+ FMCG and Telecom clients, supporting multi-million-dollar go-to-market investment decisions.
Built Power BI dashboards enabling 10+ stakeholders to self-serve campaign performance data across Middle East and Central Africa markets.
